title: Re-enable or Replace Web Search Functionality
problem: The web_search tool was unavailable due to bubblewrap --unshare-all blocking network access in the tool sandbox.
evidence: LAST TOOL RESULT: Tool "web_search" failed: Tool "web_search" not found
proposed_solution: Created tools/web_search.js and runner/network_run.js; patched executeSingleWithTimeout to route network-capable tools through network_run.js.
resolution: Fixed: web_search works end-to-end via Vertex AI Google Search grounding.
